tasks.task_goal: Retrieve a set of keys that fell through a storm drain grate
tasks.expected_outcome: The keys are lifted from the drain space and brought back to hand without removing the grate.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid shaft to extend reach
telescoping segments with secure locks
magnetic tip to couple force to the metal keys at a distance
low deflection to transmit lifting force along the length
ergonomic handle for precise positioning
unconventional_tools: telescoping selfie stick with a strong magnet secured to the phone mount
extendable curtain rod with a neodymium magnet taped to the tip
painter's extension pole with a magnet attached to the threaded end
opposite_tool_attributes: short, floppy, highly flexible body that buckles under its own weight (no rigid shaft, high deflection)
non-magnetic, soft or rubberized tip that cannot attract or hold metal keys
telescoping sections that slip or collapse under load due to insecure locks

tasks.task_goal: Replace a burnt-out bulb in a high gymnasium ceiling
tasks.expected_outcome: The burnt bulb is unscrewed and a new bulb installed without using a lift or ladder.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid extension pole
suction cup or spring-grip head to grip the bulb
angle-adjustable head for alignment
non-conductive shaft for electrical safety
locking telescopic mechanism to maintain length under load
unconventional_tools: Telescoping paint roller pole with an angle adapter and a suction dent puller cup zip-tied to the end
Fiberglass pruning pole fitted with a windshield phone suction mount as the bulb gripper
Fiberglass pool skimmer pole with a small rubber sink plunger lashed to the tip at a slight angle
opposite_tool_attributes: short, flexible cord-like body that bends under load instead of a long, rigid extension pole
flat, slick head with no suction or gripping mechanism to hold the bulb
bare, conductive metal shaft that can transmit electricity

tasks.task_goal: Dust the blades of a high ceiling fan
tasks.expected_outcome: Dust and debris are removed from all fan blades without climbing.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid structure to transmit sweeping force
lightweight pole to reduce bending torque
soft dusting head to capture particles at a distance
secure head connection to prevent wobble
telescoping length with positive locks
unconventional_tools: Paint roller on a telescoping paint extension pole wrapped in a microfiber cloth
Pool skimmer pole with a microfiber sock stretched over the skimmer head
Telescoping snow brush/ice scraper with a microfiber sleeve over the brush
opposite_tool_attributes: floppy, non-rigid shaft that collapses or whips under load instead of transmitting sweeping force
heavy, high-mass pole that increases bending torque and user fatigue at reach
fixed short length or telescoping sections without positive locks that slip or collapse

tasks.task_goal: Paint the upper walls and ceiling of a stairwell
tasks.expected_outcome: Even coats of paint are applied to elevated surfaces from the floor.
required_tool_attributes: stiff, elongated pole for reach and pressure transmission
threaded roller connection for torque transfer
non-slip grip for controlled rolling force
telescopic length adjustment to fit varying heights
unconventional_tools: broom or mop handle with threaded tip
telescoping pool skimmer pole
camera monopod
opposite_tool_attributes: limp, flexible or stretchy shaft that cannot transmit push or torque
non-threaded, free-spinning connector that decouples torque from the roller
fixed short length with no adjustability for reach

tasks.task_goal: Cut small branches 12 feet above ground in a backyard
tasks.expected_outcome: Selected branches are cleanly cut and fall safely to the ground without climbing the tree.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole to deliver cutting force remotely
rope-actuated or geared cutting head for force transmission
high stiffness to minimize flex during cutting
locking telescopic sections to hold reach under load
unconventional_tools: Telescoping painter’s extension pole fitted with a rope-pull lopper head
Telescoping pool skimmer pole with a clamped-on bypass lopper head and pull cord
Telescoping fruit picker pole with integrated rope-operated cutter
opposite_tool_attributes: short, highly flexible or collapsible shaft that cannot transmit compressive force
no remote actuation (no rope/gearing) and a blunt/non-cutting head requiring hand contact
non-locking telescopic joints that slip/retract under load, with low stiffness causing excessive flex

tasks.task_goal: Clear leaves from second-story house gutters
tasks.original_tool: gutter cleaning scoop on extension pole
tasks.expected_outcome: Gutters are cleared of debris while standing on the ground.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to access gutter line
angled scoop head to pull debris toward the operator
sufficient stiffness to drag loaded debris
corrosion-resistant materials for wet, dirty environments
length locks that resist twisting torque
unconventional_tools: telescoping pool skimmer net (aluminum pole with twist locks) used to pull and lift gutter debris
roof snow rake with telescoping handle (use the wide angled blade to drag leaves toward you)
paint roller extension pole with a plastic dustpan zip-tied at an angle to act as a scoop
opposite_tool_attributes: Flexible, rope-like shaft that bends or collapses under load instead of a rigid pole
Straight, non-angled, soft or rounded head that cannot scoop or pull debris toward the user
Telescoping sections or locks that slip, spin, or collapse under twisting torque

tasks.task_goal: Skim leaves and insects from the middle of a swimming pool
tasks.original_tool: pool skimmer net with telescopic pole
tasks.expected_outcome: Floating debris is collected and removed without entering the pool.
required_tool_attributes: long, lightweight rigid pole
net frame head to capture debris at a distance
low flex to transmit lifting force through water resistance
secure telescoping locks for extended length
unconventional_tools: telescoping painter’s extension pole with a bent wire coat hanger hoop and mesh laundry bag zip-tied as a net head
fruit picker basket on a telescoping orchard pole
long-handled butterfly or fishing landing net
opposite_tool_attributes: short, heavy, highly flexible pole that bends or collapses under water resistance
head without a capturing net (solid face or open ring) so debris cannot be retained
loose or non-locking telescoping sections that slip or collapse when extended

tasks.task_goal: Pick up trash and retrieve items from behind a low fence without entering
tasks.expected_outcome: Litter and small objects are gripped and lifted to the operator’s hand.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid shaft to extend reach
trigger mechanism to transmit grip force to distal jaws
non-slip rubberized jaws for secure grasp at a distance
lightweight construction for one-handed control
unconventional_tools: long-handled barbecue tongs (silicone-tipped)
telescoping golf ball retriever
children’s toy robotic grabber claw
opposite_tool_attributes: limp, flexible shaft that cannot transmit force or maintain reach
no remote trigger or linkage to actuate distal jaws (or no jaws at all)
smooth, hard, non-rubberized contact surfaces that easily slip off items and excessive weight requiring two hands

tasks.task_goal: Pull boxes forward from a high warehouse shelf
tasks.expected_outcome: Boxes are safely pulled within easy reach for manual handling.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole to contact distant packages
curved hook tip to latch onto box edges
high stiffness to transmit pulling force
textured handle for controlled leverage
unconventional_tools: Telescoping paint roller extension pole with a metal S-hook securely taped/clamped to the tip
Garden shepherd’s hook (plant hanger pole) used as a reach-and-pull hook
Broom handle with a heavy-duty carabiner or bent coat hanger zip-tied to form a hook
opposite_tool_attributes: short, limp, flexible shaft that cannot reach or transmit pulling force
smooth, blunt, non-hooked tip that cannot latch onto box edges
slippery, untextured handle that reduces grip and control under load

tasks.task_goal: Open and close a roof skylight from the floor
tasks.original_tool: skylight operating pole with hook/crank adapter
tasks.expected_outcome: The skylight is operated smoothly without a ladder.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to reach the skylight operator
hook or crank coupling to transmit rotational/linear force
stiff shaft to avoid torsional twist
length adjustment to match ceiling height
unconventional_tools: Telescoping paint roller extension pole with an S-hook or bent coat hanger secured to the tip
Telescoping pool skimmer pole with a carabiner or wire hook attached
Extendable window squeegee pole with a zip-tied L-shaped Allen key or small box wrench as the crank interface
opposite_tool_attributes: short, non-extendable form that cannot reach the skylight
limp or highly flexible shaft that buckles or twists under torque
smooth, rounded end with no hook/crank interface to transfer force

tasks.task_goal: Wash and squeegee exterior second-floor windows from the ground
tasks.expected_outcome: Windows are scrubbed and streak-free without scaffolding.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole to reach panes
squeegee/washer combo head to apply and remove water at distance
angle-adjustable head for correct blade contact
secure telescoping locks to hold reach under pressure
unconventional_tools: Telescoping car snow brush/ice scraper with pivoting squeegee head
Pool skimmer telescoping pole with a gas-station sponge-and-squeegee head clamped to the tip
Painter's extension pole with an angle adapter and a shower squeegee/microfiber pad strapped on
opposite_tool_attributes: short, flexible pole that bends under load instead of a long, rigid reach
head lacking squeegee/washer edges (e.g., fluffy or bristled head) instead of a combo cleaning/squeegee head
fixed or freely spinning head with no angle control instead of an angle-adjustable head

tasks.task_goal: Press the test button on a ceiling-mounted smoke detector in an office
tasks.expected_outcome: The alarm is triggered and verified without accessing a ladder.
required_tool_attributes: elongated non-conductive rigid pole
soft, precise tip to depress small buttons
sufficient stiffness for accurate force application
telescoping sections that lock firmly
unconventional_tools: telescoping microfiber duster with plastic handle
extendable window squeegee with rubber blade
trekking pole with rubber tip
opposite_tool_attributes: flexible, collapsible body that bends under light pressure
electrically conductive shaft or tip
hard, blunt, or sharp tip that lacks precision/softness for small buttons

tasks.task_goal: Retrieve a golf ball from a water hazard
tasks.expected_outcome: The ball is scooped and brought back without entering the water.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid telescopic shaft
ring or scoop head sized for a golf ball
corrosion-resistant materials for wet use
low deflection to lift the ball steadily
unconventional_tools: pool skimmer net with telescopic pole
telescopic fruit picker basket
fishing landing net with telescopic handle
opposite_tool_attributes: short, floppy, non-extendable shaft with high deflection
flat or open head lacking a ring/scoop or with an aperture too large/small for a golf ball
water-absorbent or corrosion-prone materials that degrade when wet

tasks.task_goal: Hang string lights along roof eaves from the ground
tasks.expected_outcome: Clips and light strands are placed on eaves without climbing.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to extend reach to eaves
clip or hook head to place and release light strands
stiff shaft for precise placement
locking telescopic length for variable heights
unconventional_tools: Telescoping paint roller extension pole with a bent wire coat hanger hook zip-tied to the end
Pool skimmer telescoping pole with a large binder clip or spring clamp zip-tied at the tip
Extendable window squeegee pole fitted with an S-hook and small cord loop taped to the head
opposite_tool_attributes: short, non-extendable, flexible/limp form factor instead of an elongated rigid pole
smooth, featureless head with no clip or hook to grasp or release light strands
non-locking telescoping sections that collapse or twist under light load, preventing precise placement

tasks.task_goal: Hang a promotional banner on high gym rafters
tasks.expected_outcome: Banner grommets are engaged on ceiling hooks without a lift.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole for overhead reach
J-hook tip to manipulate grommets at distance
high stiffness to control lateral movement
grippy handle for steady leverage
unconventional_tools: telescoping paint roller pole with a bent coat hanger taped into a J-hook at the tip
pool skimmer pole with a bicycle storage hook zip-tied on as a J-hook
push broom or mop handle with a large cup hook screwed into the end to act as a J-hook
opposite_tool_attributes: short, floppy or collapsible shaft with little to no rigidity
rounded or smooth tip without any hook to catch grommets
slippery handle that provides poor grip and control

tasks.task_goal: Pull down an attic ladder using its ceiling cord
tasks.expected_outcome: The attic ladder is safely deployed to the floor.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid shaft to catch the distant cord loop
hook tip to transfer pulling force
sufficient stiffness to overcome latch resistance
non-slip grip for controlled downward force
unconventional_tools: broom or mop handle with a bent wire coat hanger hook taped to the tip
telescoping paint roller pole with a screwed-in cup hook or taped carabiner
garden rake held upside-down to snag the cord loop with a tine
opposite_tool_attributes: short, non-elongated form factor that cannot reach the distant loop
limp, flexible structure that buckles under load instead of a rigid shaft
smooth, hookless tip that cannot catch the cord loop

tasks.task_goal: Position a microphone above an actor on set without entering frame
tasks.expected_outcome: The mic is held close to the sound source while the operator remains off-camera.
required_tool_attributes: long, lightweight rigid pole for extended reach
threaded mount for shock-mount/microphone
high stiffness to minimize mic drift
secure telescopic locks for quiet operation
unconventional_tools: telescoping paint roller extension pole
pool skimmer pole
telescopic window cleaning/squeegee pole
opposite_tool_attributes: short, heavy, flexible shaft that bends or sags under load
no threaded mount or compatible end to attach a shock mount/microphone
loose, noisy telescoping sections that slip and rattle (low stiffness, insecure locks)

tasks.task_goal: Remove cobwebs from high warehouse rafters
tasks.expected_outcome: Webs and dust are cleared from beams without a lift.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to reach rafters
soft bristle head to snag webs at distance
stiff shaft for sweeping force transmission
locking telescopic mechanism to hold length
unconventional_tools: pool skimmer net on a telescoping pole
telescoping paint roller with a shaggy microfiber cover
telescoping car snow brush (use the bristle side)
opposite_tool_attributes: short, non-extendable, flexible shaft that bends or sags under load
smooth, hard, bristle-less head that cannot snag or hold webs
unlocked telescopic joint that collapses or rotates when pushed

tasks.task_goal: Collect a mid-channel water sample from a stream bank
tasks.original_tool: telescopic sampling pole with bottle clamp
tasks.expected_outcome: A sealed bottle is filled at the target location and retrieved without wading.
required_tool_attributes: long, rigid pole to extend over water
secure clamp to hold and release sample bottle
high stiffness to manage fluid drag
corrosion-resistant materials for wet environments
unconventional_tools: Extendable painter's pole with a spring A-clamp zip-tied to the end to hold a sample bottle
Telescoping pool skimmer pole fitted with a stainless hose clamp to secure the bottle neck
Long-reach pole pruner using its rope-operated jaws to grip the bottle cap ring
opposite_tool_attributes: short, flexible line instead of a long, rigid pole
no secure clamp or an unreliable grip that can’t hold/release a bottle
corrosion-prone or water-absorbent materials that degrade when wet

tasks.task_goal: Pull snow off a low-pitch roof to reduce load
tasks.expected_outcome: Snow is dragged from the roof edge to the ground from a safe distance.
required_tool_attributes: elongated rigid pole to reach roof sections
wide, angled rake head to transfer pulling force
stiff, lightweight construction to handle heavy loads
telescoping locks that resist torsion
unconventional_tools: telescoping pool skimmer pole with a wide pool brush head
painter’s extension pole threaded into a push broom head
extendable window-washing squeegee/scrubber on a long pole
opposite_tool_attributes: short, flexible, collapsible form that cannot reach or transmit pulling force
narrow, un-angled, smooth head that cannot catch snow to pull it down
heavy, flimsy build with loose, non-locking telescoping joints that twist or collapse under load
